sources.productionUsage: Breezy HRIS may expose owner nested objects; SRS sanitizeCandidate drops them before persistence.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: BreezyCandidate type has no owner field; sanitize maps identity/stage/location/resume only.

sources.productionUsage: candidate-intelligence / P188.2 extractBreezyAssignee probe nested assignee paths on sanitized objects — always empty in production ingestion.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Ingestion store: 0/677 candidates with owner/assignee/recruiter keys.

sources.productionUsage: No top-level recruiter field retained on BreezyCandidate after sanitize.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Schema mismatch / missing integration from Breezy assignee API.

sources.productionUsage: Writes candidate-ingestion.json only (identity, position, stage). Does not store recruiter.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Never imports recruiter ownership into ingestion or workflow create path.

sources.productionUsage: Can write workflow assignedRecruiter when P158_AUTOMATIC_ASSIGNMENTS_ENABLED=true AND confirmAssignment=true. Local audit is simulation-only.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Production assigns=0; simulated=75. Feature remains simulation/disabled for durable writes.

sources.productionUsage: Read-only ownership consumer; asserts workflowStoreUnchanged on dry runs.
Consumes assignment state for lifecycle; does not invent owners.
Blocks advancement/send when Unassigned; updates status/actions only (preserves recruiter when omitted).
Sole durable owner field: CandidateWorkflowRecord.assignedRecruiter. Defaults to Unassigned.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: All 684 records currently Unassigned with recruiterAssignmentSource=null.
Audit retains named assignments for 377 current-cohort candidates, but workflow rows no longer reflect them.

sources.productionUsage: P158 dashboard + /api/recruiting/recruiter-assignments/run (sim by default); UI manual assign via /api/candidates/workflows.
sources.lastWriter: executive POST run / candidates-section manual save
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Manual assigns rare (audit shows ~10 assign_recruiter globally). Executive auto path stays dry-run without flags.

sources.productionUsage: P62/P151 build-assignment-decision → apply-recruiter-assignments. Writes auto source when automation runs.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Assignments historically wrote successfully then were lost from durable store (see overwrite root cause).

sources.productionUsage: POST /api/candidates/workflows (manual), POST .../auto-assign (P62 persist), P158 run endpoint.
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Live durable state shows Unassigned despite historical auto_assign audit volume.

sources.productionUsage: backfillWorkflowRecordsForCandidates creates missing rows with assignedRecruiter='Unassigned' (ingestion_import).
sources.whyOwnershipMissing: Create path never copies Breezy owner; concurrent full-file upserts can recreate Unassigned shells after auto-assign.

primaryRootCause: Breezy ownership never imported (schema drop) + durable Unassigned create path + lost-update/overwrite of historical auto-assignments (ingestion race / unlocked store) + P158 production assignment disabled.
whyOwnershipDisappeared: Named recruiters were assigned by automation (audit), then wiped when concurrent ingestion_import / full-file upserts recreated or clobbered workflow rows as Unassigned. Breezy owner was never available as a backfill source because sanitize discards it.

evidence: BreezyCandidate has no owner/assignee/recruiter fields after sanitizeCandidate
UI join uses local assignedRecruiter only (build-candidate-workflow-row)
rootCauseFindings.detail: Breezy ownership is never mapped into the SRS candidate or workflow schema — primary upstream gap.
Ingestion creates workflow ownership as Unassigned and never imports Breezy owners.

evidence: Audit shows named auto_assign for 377 current candidates while durable store is 100% Unassigned
Rapid wipe pattern (named then ingestion_import): 2444 observed pairings
resolveAssignedRecruiter cannot preserve ownership when clobbering write believes record is new
rootCauseFindings.detail: P62/territory auto-assign historically persisted named recruiters, then concurrent ingestion_import / lost-update races wiped durable ownership back to Unassigned.
P158 durable production assignment never ran in this environment — cannot replenish wiped owners.

evidence: P188.2 extractBreezyAssignee finds nothing on sanitized ingestion rows
P175 sourced_by_name not mapped to workflow assignedRecruiter
rootCauseFindings.detail: Enrichment and export paths lack a durable Breezy→workflow ownership integration.

evidence: Historical audit proves ownership existed then disappeared from workflows
rootCauseFindings.detail: Ownership disappearance is a durability regression (lost update / recreate), not an intentional policy to leave all Unassigned.

evidence: P158 simulations never became production assigned events
rootCauseFindings.detail: Simulated recommendations were never persisted as authoritative ownership.

evidence: sanitizeCandidate discards any raw Breezy owner/assignee before store write
rootCauseFindings.detail: If Breezy responses include owner, it is discarded at sanitize — never reaches `.data`.

evidence: No migration backfills assignedRecruiter from audit last-named values
Workflow history currently shows only Unassigned transitions for recruiter changes
rootCauseFindings.detail: No authorized migration restores last durable named recruiter from audit into workflow rows.
